meta.siteTitle: Sacs — Operating system for conscious retailers
meta.siteDescription: Sacs is the all-in-one platform to manage your retail business.

hero.title: Full visibility across your entire retail operation.
hero.subtitle: From warehouse to counter to online store. Sales, stock, customers, and loyalty in one place.

cards.demoDesc: We show you Sacs with your business data. 30 min, no strings attached.
cards.startDesc: Create your free account and set up your store in 15 minutes. No credit card.

blog.title: Ideas for conscious retailers
blog.subtitle: Trends, innovation, and real retail stories.

contact.metaDesc: Book a personalized 30-minute demo with a Sacs expert.
contact.heroLead: We show you the platform running with real data from your industry. No slides, no pressure.
contact.step1Desc: Tell us what's holding you back and what you need to solve.
contact.step2Title: We show you how to solve it
contact.step2Desc: We open Sacs live and configure it for your use case.
contact.step3Desc: We talk about where you want to go and how to get there with Sacs.
contact.processTitle: What to expect from the meeting
contact.process1Desc: Tell us how you operate today, how many locations you have, what channels you use, and what hurts.
contact.process2Desc: We show you Sacs running with data and scenarios from your type of business. POS, inventory, customers, reports.
contact.process3Desc: Together we define the implementation plan, migration timelines, and how to start. No pressure.
contact.afterTitle: From meeting to operating in 24 hours
contact.after1Desc: We present a personalized plan based on your size and needs. Transparent, no fine print.
contact.after2Desc: If you accept, your account is enabled that same day. No waiting, no long processes.
contact.after3Desc: An expert helps you set up your catalog, inventory, and POS. The next day you're operating.
contact.migrateTitle: Migrating is easier than you think
contact.migrateDesc: Our team migrates your catalog, customers, and sales history. You just validate. Without losing a day of sales.
contact.migrate1Desc: Excel, CSV, or from your current system. We format it.
contact.migrate2Desc: Products, variants, prices, customers, and suppliers.
contact.migrate3Desc: Training included. Your account executive walks with you every step.
contact.noRiskDesc: Try 7 days free. No card. If it doesn't convince you, cancel with one click. No calls, no retention, no fine print.
contact.consultingDetail: . With your annual plan, personalized implementation consulting is completely free.
contact.waText: Prefer to chat? Message us directly on WhatsApp.

trust.quote: The platform gave us the control we needed to scale to 42 locations.

footer.tagline: Operating system for conscious retailers. Technology with Mexican soul.
footer.impact: 10% of every license creates social impact.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Have another question?
faq.a1: We have a free plan with all essential features. Paid plans start at $30/month and include advanced features like multi-location, premium reports, and AXO (AI).
faq.q2: How long does it take to set up Sacs?
faq.a2: Initial setup takes 10 to 15 minutes. It includes creating your account, setting up your catalog, and connecting your first payment method. Our team walks you through every step.
faq.q3: What kind of support do you offer?
faq.a3: All plans include chat and email support. Pro and Enterprise plans include priority phone support and a dedicated account manager.
faq.q4: Does it integrate with other tools?
faq.a4: Yes. Sacs integrates with major payment processors, e-commerce platforms, accounting systems, and marketing tools. We also offer an open API.
faq.a5: Absolutely. We use bank-grade encryption (AES-256), cloud servers with redundancy, and automatic backups every hour.
faq.q6: Can I migrate from another system?
faq.a6: Yes. Our onboarding team helps you migrate your catalog, customers, and sales history at no extra cost. The typical process takes 1 to 3 business days.

finalCta.title: Start today. It's free.
finalCta.desc: Set up your business in 15 minutes. No credit card, no contracts.

common.configure15: Set up your business in 15 minutes. No credit card, no contracts.
